prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低位次分别约为1299→1758→1977→1843→1645名，整体呈先降后升的V型走势；2023年触底1977名后连续两年回升（2024年1843名、202                        5年1645名），近两年累计前移约332名，2025年基准位次约1645名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为63人，2024–2025年缩减至61人；2026年计划增至65人，较2025年扩招约6.6%，小幅缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第18名，近年稳定在Top2                        0，属于顶尖高校层次；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（论文数据造假、院长被免职等），但学校处理态度明确（零容忍）；抖音综合热度排                         名第26（较热），短视频曝光量较高；2022年河南曾出现严重断档，2025年也有投档线暴跌信号，但均为外省现象，天津本地未见明显异常；拥有17个A-及以上                        学科，其中土木工程A+、城乡规划学A+、环境科学与工程A+、管理科学与工程A+、建筑学A等为全国顶尖水平，与招生专业中的工科试验班（建筑规划景观与设计类、智能建造类                         等）高度对应，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，而同济王牌土木建筑类专业社会热度分化观望至                         明显劝退，可能对相关专业报考产生一定抑制；天津市2026年高考报名总数约82000人，较2025年71938人增长约14%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；同济大学位于上海，在天津无本地招生倾斜；2025年天津招生61人占该校全国计划比例较小，地域偏好因素不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近                        两年持续前移（竞争加剧）、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（缓解竞争）、天津市考生总数显著增长（加剧竞争）三重因素，扩招与考生增长存在对冲；考虑到考生增幅（+14%）远超                        扩招幅度（+6.6%），且位次已连续两年上升，预计2026年竞争较2025年略加剧，位次小幅前移。预测最低位次约1680名，区间1488–1872名。

- 工科试验班（国豪精英班）
- 工科试验班（计算机与电子类）
- 工科试验班（卓越计划班）。

- 人文科学试验班（传播学、德语、英语等）
- 医学试验班（临床医学、口腔医学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1680名，区间1488–1872名。位次在区间中上段（约1600名以内）可重点冲刺一档的国豪精英班、计算机与电子类等王牌工科试验班；位次在区间中段（约1600–1750                         名）应以二档的法学、人文科学试验班、医学试验班为主力选择；位次在区间下段（约1750名以后）建议以三档的政治学与行政学、临床医学（5+3一体化）保底，同时可尝试冲                         刺二档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Tianjin comprehensive subjects were approximately 1299 → 1758 → 1977 → 1843 → 1645, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing and then increasing; after hitting a low of 1977 in 2023, it rebounded for two consecutive years (1843 in 2024, 1645 in 2025), moving up by about 332 places cumulatively in the last two years, with a baseline ranking of about 1645 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Tianjin was 63 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 61 in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan increases to 65 students, an expansion of about 6.6% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 18th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings main list, stable in the top 20 in recent years, belonging to the top-tier university level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (paper data fabrication, dean dismissal, etc.), but the university's handling attitude is clear (zero tolerance); Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 26th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure; there was a serious gap in Henan in 2022, and signals of a sharp drop in admission scores in 2025, but these are phenomena in other provinces, with no obvious anomalies in Tianjin; it has 17 A- or above disciplines, including Civil Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Architecture A, etc., which are top national levels, highly corresponding to the engineering experimental classes (Architecture, Planning, Landscape and Design, Intelligent Construction, etc.) in the enrollment majors, strongly attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering are highly recommended in social popularity, while Tongji's flagship civil engineering and architecture majors show social popularity divergence from wait-and-see to obvious discouragement, potentially suppressing applications for related majors; the total number of Tianjin 2026 college entrance exam registrants is about 82,000, an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025, with the expanded candidate scale intensifying overall competition; Tongji University is located in Shanghai, with no local enrollment preference in Tianjin; in 2025, Tianjin enrolled 61 students, a small proportion of the university's national plan, making regional preference factors insignificant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three factors of continuous upward movement in historical rankings in the last two years (intensified competition), a slight expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan (easing competition), and a significant increase in the number of Tianjin candidates (intensifying competition), the expansion and candidate growth offset each other; given that the candidate growth rate (+14%) far exceeds the expansion rate (+6.6%), and rankings have risen for two consecutive years, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings moving up slightly. Predicted minimum ranking about 1680, range 1488–1872.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Guohao Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Electronics)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Plan Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Law
- Humanities Experimental Class (Communication, German, English, etc.)
- Medical Experimental Class (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Political Science and Public Administration
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Medical Experimental Class (Guohao Elite Class/Basic Medicine).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1680, range 1488–1872. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (about within 1600) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Guohao Elite Class, Computer and Electronics, and other top engineering experimental classes; candidates with rankings in the middle part of the range (about 1600–1750) should mainly choose Tier 2 Law, Humanities Experimental Class, Medical Experimental Class; candidates with rankings in the lower part of the range (about after 1750) are advised to use Tier 3 Political Science and Public Administration, Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) as safety options, while also attempting to sprint for Tier 2 majors.
